I find that if the boss phases I find it hard to survive and ramp back into this after so still struggle with multiphase bosses
For this comp. I prioritize pollux rouse as he's the main dps. For multi phase boss, it'll just explode with bleed next turn
Ohhh
Also, you dont pull plumes using pollux. You use plumes to pull hearts instead
To make cleansing judgment to 0 cost
Idea is. Heart, plume, heart, pollux posse, heart, then burst with cleanse 0

Thais dupe cleansing judgment too. Save 3 3/3 heart for burst turn
Add in angry horla for good measure

New player, just finished Ch 8 heading into Ch9 -  anything I could optimise re:builds here? Kath is doing an absurd carry job, is kaths wheel her BIS? Was considering investing more copies into it
I've been clearing arc 2 story with Kath castor
Her BiS depends on her build. Kath has 4 builds.
Kath usually goes around with Alva's wheel since it's the most accessible one to +12.
Tank Kath: you use feast covenant put unyielding will and last verse on her for insane shields
Allrounder Kath(very strong choice in my opinion for f2p arc 2 story): blade of Titan+12 and unyielding will(alvas wheel) with paradox covnant
Oh damn that sounds busted
Keyflare Kath: last verse+tawil's wheel. The covant varies with stage. This is full chaos team and is for specific stuff I'm not familiar with
Then there's full dps Kath: her signature wheel+Titan with a dps covnant that gives crit rate. You kill before you die.
Genuinely thanks a ton, I've screenshotted all these for future ref
No prob
Generally you wanna run tank Kath or Allrounder Kath.
If you are f2p, u will probably end up with blade+alva for quite a while
I suggest getting blade+12 first. It's a huge dps boost and makes Allrounder Kath available
On the harder content where you need to stall, you will want to use feast cov though.
Cool cool, ty guys
My Allrounder Kath shields in 3-9
My castor is e0 so he's only for shielding. Still Kath is almost as good as him. Sometimes better.
She wants crit rate on her covenant as not critting on hyper flare is a huge dps drop. Paradox gives free 20% cr

Step one would be to cut Castor
From there the supports are
Standard Pool: Ramona (Timesworn), Karen, Winkle, Tinct, 
Limited Pool: Ryker, Horla, Clem
Whats important is to make sure to have at least vuln and weakness source
i see
Oh okay thank you! I am currently using winkle and tinct, who would be best suited the pull for with them?

Ryker - vuln source
Horla e1 - less consistent vuln source
Horla e2 - more consistent vuln source

I would still consider not going for Over-Exalt. Your acc isn't old, there's no much sense in going for OE since you will clear the content nevertheless for now. Moreover, Thais is just the best all-around support in the game, skipping her might not be a wise choice. Plus having more awakeners for more d-tide teams is always good.
Castor is good with Kath. Try Ham, Horla/Winkle to fill the 2 spots

Well guys I finished Chapter 9 with the Kathy team. I wanted to know if I should change teams for the Astral Realm, and what would be worth investing in (I have a Time Loop, and after finishing Chapter 9, I saved up some Silver, but I'm not sure if it's worth pulling on Thais' banner tomorrow, trying for more copies of GMurphy, or saving for a future banner).

Thais is always worth, best support in the game. That said, I would rather cut Tinct's wheel and covenant and make her Keyflare support. Give her Thais's wheel if you have it, lifedrain covenant and Gateway of Truth. You might want to check your overall critrate in the battle since you have E3 Tinct and Kath with Blade/Crimson covenant, Castor is better with Dmg Amplification wheel. Give Castor TT Black since he can't DPS at E1 anyway, no much point in having Steppen. Look for Feast or Paradox for your Kath.
